quickAnswer: To handle turning spreadsheet data into a plain-English summary, start with PDFs, decide that the output must be accurate study notes, and use AI only after the source material is clear. Start with PDFs, decide that the output must be accurate study notes, use Gemini for one reviewable version, and check it before changing formats or adding another tool. Gemini should create the first reviewable version, Notion AI belongs in the second pass only when accurate study notes needs more control, and Airtable should be saved for review or export after the core result is right.
quickDecision: For turning spreadsheet data into a plain-English summary, choose Gemini first when the input is PDFs and the output needs to be accurate study notes. Choose Notion AI when source document matters more. Choose Airtable when you need a lighter review, export, or fallback pass.
realWorldScenario: small business operators have PDFs and lecture slides and need accurate study notes without drifting into an unrelated workflow. Prepared 2026-05-29.

steps.title: Prepare PDFs
steps.detail: Put the real input in one place before opening a tool: PDFs, lecture slides, class notes, research sources, turning spreadsheet data into a plain-English summary, any required facts, the audience, and the format you need at the end. Remove private details you are not allowed to share.
steps.why: AI output is only as useful as the material and constraints you give it.
steps.output: A clean input bundle and one clear target format: accurate study notes.

steps.title: Ask for the first usable version
steps.detail: Use Gemini for a first pass that tries to turn spreadsheet data into a plain-English summary. Ask it to preserve source facts, flag uncertainty, and organize the result into sections you can review.
steps.why: The first pass should create a reviewable accurate study notes, not a finished answer you trust blindly.
steps.output: A structured accurate study notes with visible gaps or uncertain points.

steps.title: Check the answer before polishing
steps.detail: Compare the AI output with PDFs. Fix names, dates, numbers, unsupported claims, missing context, and tone before you ask for nicer wording.
steps.why: Polished wrong information is harder to catch than rough information.
steps.output: A corrected accurate study notes that is ready for formatting or wording cleanup.

steps.title: Change the format only after the facts are right
steps.detail: Use Notion AI when the verified accurate study notes needs a different format, structure, or source-aware second pass. Keep the same facts from PDFs so the rewrite does not drift from the original.
steps.why: Format changes are safer after the substance is already checked.
steps.output: A version that fits the channel, document, post, or recipient.

steps.title: Finish with a human review
steps.detail: Use Airtable for cleanup only after the main accurate study notes is checked against PDFs. Read the final result as the recipient would: on the device, in the app, or in the document where it will actually be used.
steps.why: The final review catches tone, missing context, and practical usability issues.
steps.output: A final result you can send, post, study from, or save with confidence.

bestPicksBySituation.situation: If you already have PDFs, choose Gemini.
bestPicksBySituation.why: Gemini is the closest match because it is built for users already working in Google's ecosystem and keeps the work tied to PDFs.

bestPicksBySituation.why: Notion AI is the better second choice when teams or individuals already organizing work in Notion matters more than the first tool's handling of PDFs.

bestPicksBySituation.situation: If you want the lightest review or export step for accurate study notes, choose Airtable.
bestPicksBySituation.why: Airtable helps when you need workflows that need database-style workflows and AI-assisted ops and want a fallback that is easier to adapt on a phone or desktop.
